verses.text: Thukhente in a uk hun lai-in tua gam sungah kialpi tung a, Judah gam sunga Bethlehem khuami khat, a zi leh a tapa nihte tawh Moab gamah a peem dingin a pai uh hi
A pa' min Elimelek hi a, a zi' min Naomi hi-in, a tapa nihte min Mahlon leh Khilion ahi hi. Amaute pen Judah gam Bethlehem-a Efrathah mite ahi uh hi. Amaute Moab gamah pai-in tua lai-ah om uh hi
Ahih hangin Naomi' pasal Elimelek si a, a tapa nihte bek tawh tuanu a om hi
Hih a tapa nihte in Moab mite zi-in la uh hi. A khat min Orpah hi a, adang khat min Ruth ahi hi. Tua lai-ah amaute kum sawm bang teng uh hi
Tua ciangin Mahlon leh Khilion si a, tua nupi a tapa nihte leh a pasal in sihsan hi
Tua ciangin tuanu a mote gel tawh Moab gam panin a ciahkik dingin kithawi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a mite kemin an a piakna thu Moab gamsung panin amah in za hi
Tua ahih ciangin ama omna mun panin a mote gel tawh tuanu dingkhia a, Judah gamah a ciahkik dingin pai uh hi
Ahih hangin Naomi in a mo nihte kiangah, “Pai un, na inn tuak uhah ciahkik un la, na nute uh tawh om un. A sisate hita leh kei hita leh nong limbawl uh mah bangin Topa in note hong limbawl ta hen
Topa in na pasal kik uh inn tuakah hong nuamsasak ta hen!” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute namin, amaute a kap uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Hilo hi, na mipihte kiangah nang tawh kong ciahkhawm ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Naomi in, “Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, bang hangin hong zui ding na hi uh hiam? Note' pasal hong hi thei dingin tapa nei nawn ding ka hi hiam

Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, na paina ding uhah pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nei dingin ka teek luata hi. Pasal nei dingin kilamen ing ci mah lengzong, tunitak mahmahin pasal nei-in tapate nei phial ta mah lengzong
amaute a khan' khit dong ngakzo ding na hi uh hiam? Hilo hi, ka tanute aw, Topa in kei hong bawlsia ahih manin note sangin nakpi takin kei ka lunggimzaw hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute a kap kik uh hi. Orpah in a teeknu namin ciah a, ahih hangin Ruth in a teeknu beel hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “En in, na sanggamnu a mipihte leh a pasian-te kiangah ciahkik khin hi. Na sanggamnu' nungah nang zong ciah in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Ruth in, “Nang kong nusiatna ding ahi a, nang zuihna panin ka ciahkikna ding ahi zongin hong cici nawn kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina-ah ka pai ding a, na giahna-ah ka giak ding hi. Na mite keima mite hi ding a, na Pasian keima Pasian hi ding hi
Na sihna-ah si-in ka kivui ding hi. Sihna cih lohbuang thudang hangin kong nusiat taak leh Topa in kei hong dawm kei ta hen,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Naomi in amah a zuih ding a lungsim a khentatna a muh ciangin bangmah ci nawnlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Bethlehem a tun' mateng uh a nihun paisuak uh hi. Bethlehem a tun' uh ciangin amaute' hangin a khuazangpi-un lum lialua-in nupite in, “Hihnu Naomi mah ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Naomi hong ci nawn kei un; Mara hong ci un; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglianpa in nakpi takin kei hong gimsak hi
A dimin ka paikhia a, Topa in a hawmin hong ciahpih kik hi. Topa in kei hong gimsakin, Vanglianpa in kei tungah gimna hong tungsak ahih ciangin bang hangin Naomi hong ci lai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-a bangin Moab gam panin Naomi, Moab mi a monu Ruth tawh hong ciahkik hi. Mangbuhham lak kipat laitakin Bethlehem khua hong tung uh hi.
